_**Agent (copilot/claude-sonnet-4.5)**_

The user wants to:
1. Move HTML files to a separate folder
2. Configure GitHub Pages to only process that folder (not the entire repo including the workers/*.md files)

This makes sense - the workers/*.md files are planning documents that contain Liquid-like syntax that's causing Jekyll issues. By moving the actual website HTML files to a separate folder and configuring GitHub Pages to only build from that folder, we can avoid the Jekyll parsing errors.

1. Check current structure to see what HTML files exist
